content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vtuber.local_animation
FILE: cosmos/integration/vtuber/local_animation.py (884 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: Local Avatar Animation - Wav2Lip neural + Face Rig with tracking points
Replaces D-ID cloud dependency with local rendering for the cyborg Cosmos avatar.

Primary: Wav2Lip neural lip sync (GPU)
Fallback: FaceRigAnimator - manual tracking points + Delaunay mesh warping (CPU)

CLASSES:
- LocalAnimationConfig: Configuration for local avatar animation
- MouthRegion: Detected mouth region information
- FaceRegionDetector: Finds mouth region with 3-tier fallback:
1. MediaPipe Face Mesh (468 landmarks)

  Methods: def detect(self, image: np.ndarray) -> MouthRegion
  Methods: def cleanup(self)
- Wav2LipRenderer: Neural lip sync using Wav2Lip model.

Expects ``wav2lip_gan.pth`` (or compatible
  Methods: def load(self) -> bool
  Methods: def available(self) -> bool
  Methods: def render(self, face_image: np.ndarray, audio_chunk: np.ndarray, mouth_region: MouthRegion) -> Opti
  Methods: def cleanup(self)
- FaceRigAnimator: Face animation using manually placed tracking points and mesh warping.

Like D-I
  Methods: def setup(self, image: np.ndarray, mouth_region: MouthRegion) -> bool
  Methods: def available(self) -> bool
  Methods: def render(self, state: AvatarState) -> Optional[np.ndarray]
- LocalAnimationBackend: Orchestrates face detection, renderer selection, and frame output.

Usage::

   
  Methods: async def initialize(self, face_image_path: Optional[str]=None) -> bool
  Methods: async def render_frame(self, state: AvatarState, audio_chunk: Optional[np.ndarray]=None) -> Optional
  Methods: async def cleanup(self)
